event.name: F1 Monaco Grand Prix 2026 — Qualifying Result

context.pre_match_notes: Monaco: the circuit where qualifying delta has maximum predictive weight. No overtaking — track position is permanent. 0.4s qualifying margin at Monaco is the strongest qualifying signal in the F1 calendar. No wet weather. Clean session. Street circuit — tire warm-up on outlap critical.

question: At Monaco, how does the 0.4s qualifying delta translate to race victory probability?

verified_outcome.key_variable: qualifying_delta_modifier MAXIMUM at Monaco — no overtaking means P1 = race win with 0.4s margin
